creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for your submission.  Some comments:

- Please submit a diff next time and not a shar for port changes.
  They are a lot easier to review.
- The shar contained bogus changes in pkg-{plist,descr}
- Please bump PORTREVISION if the resulting package changes
- That is all :)

Now waiting for mentor approval: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D10204
